meta.description: Retail chemist / pharmacy outlets in Agra, Uttar Pradesh

fields.source_sno: original 'S No' from spreadsheet, null if the row was unnumbered
fields.name: outlet name
fields.area: locality parsed from packed name column, null if none
fields.pincode: 6-digit pincode as string, null if missing/invalid
fields.latitude: pincode-area centroid latitude (OSM), null if none
fields.longitude: pincode-area centroid longitude (OSM), null if none

meta.pincode_note: original=present in source xlsx; derived=inferred from another xlsx row sharing the same locality; null=locality has no pincode anywhere in the source xlsx.
meta.geocoding_note: pincode source: original=source xlsx; derived=in-file locality match; mappls=Mappls geocode at place level; mappls-approx=Mappls district/city fallback (approximate). latitude/longitude = OpenStreetMap centroid of the pincode area (granularity=pincode, not exact rooftop). Mappls static key returns pincode+eLoc only, no coordinates, so OSM used for coords.
